message:
test(beads): add integration tests and test infrastructure

Add comprehensive integration tests for BeadsClient with proper test
isolation using TestBeadsEnv fixture and BEADS_DB environment override.
Also adds TestLogger for structured test output and WAL safety tests.

Key changes:
- Add with_env() to BeadsClient for per-process env vars
- Add TestLogger for structured test logging with JSON reports
- Add TestBeadsEnv fixture for isolated test environments
- Add integration tests covering full issue lifecycle
- Add WAL safety tests for database integrity
- Add concurrent access tests for multi-agent scenarios
- Fix JSON parsing for bd update/close (returns arrays)
- Allow dots in issue IDs for temp directory names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
